name: MBDMX-PLUS

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: D2FBA42A-A4D5-4D01-B88A-3320FC2FD417

comment: Eliminator Lighting MBDMX-PLUS: The MBDMX-PLUS motor will allow you to control up to 4 units simultaneously via 3-pin DMX In/Out and allow for a synchronized motor rotation and universal speed. This will results in many dramatic visual effects. Circuit Breaker protection is included so you don't need to worry about changing fuses. The MBDMX-PLUS motor is meant for indoor use only but is great for night clubs, mobile entertainers, bands, and permanent installations. Plus, there are two 3-prong Edison plus on the motor for powering pinspots or other lighting fixtures to light up the mirror ball.
